Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum((coalesce(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh", 0) - coalesce(up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh", 0)) * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh__savings" 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs JOIN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS up ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" = up."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" AND bs.state = up.state AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND up.upgrade = 1 AND up.applicability = true 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/618dc6f80d2609514a75b3e9f4bb52a0cb57d519a40f131fc39d1fd00f0cda67/316588d7-a3d2-439c-a75b-efb045c6a842/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
